long_description:
[COM]-device-agent pod is not ready [WDC] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_insufficient_running_pods_for_deployment.html

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone767:node:N/A

Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone767' and kube_pod_name = 'compute-agent-644k5'

Time:             12/03/2025 01:57 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F43894576%2Fdetails
